character.name: abstract cosmic deity, immense and sorrowful: overlapping translucent veils of night sky shaped vaguely like a robed figure, constellations drifting through the body, a single dim gold ring where a halo should be, tilted as if grieving, powerful stillness, GBA-era 16-bit pixel art, dark outline, muted dusk palette, grim dark fantasy
